---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Kasper Mortensen"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(snakecase)

# {r setup} tells R to run this chunk first
```

## Importing new data

```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886626/HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case, # does the same as clean_names?
    n_max = 100
  )


## NOTES ##
# snakecase -> all lower letters separated by _ (best practice)
# camelCase
# PascalCase
```

## Exercise: Reading other files.
```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886712/HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case # does the same as clean_names?
  )

here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886712/HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case, # does the same as clean_names?
    n_max = 100
  )

here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/6B/6B_1587569373/EDA.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case # does the same as clean_names?
  )

here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/6B/6B_1587569373/EDA.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case, # does the same as clean_names?
    n_max = 100
  )
```

## Making a function to add numbers

```{r}
#' Add two numbers together.
#'
#' @param num1 A number here.
#' @param num2 A number here.
#'
#' @returns Returns the sum of the two numbers.
#'
add_numbers <- function(num1, num2) {
  added <- num1 + num2
  return(added)
}

add_numbers(1, 2)
```
